name: Cloud
description: The brand mark as a tonal shape. The PNG is used as a mask, so the silhouette comes from its alpha channel and the colour from a token — the mark follows hue and colour scheme instead of being a fixed white bitmap.

useCases: Cropped brand mark bleeding off an accent zone (home poster field, closing field) for visual dynamics
Any decorative tonal shape inside an accent surface that must survive a hue change

antiPatterns.scenario: Printing the mark behind body copy
antiPatterns.reason: The contrast proof covers text against surface tokens, not against a shape laid over them — text over the mark is contrast nobody verified.
antiPatterns.alternative: Place the mark in the empty part of the field and let it bleed off the edge; keep the text column clear.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using it on a neutral surface without a fill token for that context
antiPatterns.reason: cloud.fill resolves to the accent-mark surface and is only proven to read on accent zones.
antiPatterns.alternative: Add a fill token for the neutral context before reaching for the mark there.

antiPatterns.scenario: Scaling it up as a full-bleed background image
antiPatterns.reason: Ambient background washes are exactly the decoration the design direction rules out.
antiPatterns.alternative: Crop it hard against an edge so it reads as a printed shape, not as atmosphere.

a11y: Decorative: aria-hidden and pointer-events: none — it carries no meaning and takes no focus
Never the sole carrier of information; the mark is redundant to the text next to it
